purpose: Current project handoff state for the next coding agent.
critical_context: Vouch is a B2B SaaS protocol for appointment deposit authorization.
Connected businesses are the merchant of record for customer deposits.
Vouch does not custody, route, escrow, or settle customer deposit funds.
Merchant protocol fees and customer deposit authorizations are separate Stripe flows.
Customer deposits are Stripe Connect direct charges on the connected account with manual capture.
Platform payment-method setup, readiness state, and related CTAs are removed.
Connected-account onboarding and charge/payout capability still gate merchant new-Vouch creation.
Customer participation is established through Vouch-specific authorization Checkout and authenticated claim.
Confirmation capture requires bilateral in-window server-received confirmation.
Cron reconciliation is recovery and stale-state cleanup only.
Vouch archive is a visibility-only participant view; archived Vouches remain detail-accessible and retain canonical workflow and payment state.

next_actions.title: Replace repo governance structure
next_actions.details: Create context/docs, context/instructions, .agents/contracts, and .agents/execution using the new file layout. Update root AGENTS.md to act as the manifest.

next_actions.title: Remove stale payment-method readiness gate from governance
next_actions.details: Completed: governance forbids platform payment-method setup and readiness state.

next_actions.title: Add design-system governance
next_actions.details: Add design-system docs and design contract covering tokens, CSS variables, component inventory, styling policy, and accessibility gates.

next_actions.title: Implement code changes for readiness gate removal
next_actions.details: Completed: dashboard blockers, CTA, setup flow, readiness fields, and tests were removed.

next_actions.title: Plan token migration
next_actions.details: Inspect globals.css, components.json, Tailwind config, and inline styles. Plan a token-backed CSS variable migration without bundling it into payment readiness changes.

next_actions.title: Continue component boundary and content audit
next_actions.details: Completed repo-wide static audit of pages, features, and non-primitive components. Removed dead variants and duplicates, split active multi-component exports, and centralized active embedded UI copy.

known_blockers.title: Generated governance needs review before repo mutation
known_blockers.impact: The governance restructure should be reviewed before replacing existing repo files.

known_blockers.title: Design tokens require implementation inventory
known_blockers.impact: The design-system document defines target policy but code-level token migration requires inspection and a separate implementation pass.

stop_conditions: Requested work creates arbitration or dispute-resolution behavior.
Requested work routes customer deposit funds through the platform account.
Requested work restores platform payment-method setup as a dashboard/customer participation gate.
Migration may destroy data without explicit approval.
Provider mutation may affect live systems without explicit approval.
Validation failure cannot be safely resolved in scope.

last_validation.reason: Narrow validation for the first component boundary and content cleanup pass.
